# Pixiedust Knowledge Wiki

> Agent-readable public index for Pixiedust knowledge packs and concepts.
> Raw Markdown for any page: /pixi-wiki/raw/<path>.

## Start here

- Root pack HTML: /pixi-wiki/root.html
- Root pack raw Markdown: /pixi-wiki/raw/llms.txt
- JSON document registry: /pixi-wiki/index.json
- Full public corpus: /pixi-wiki/llms-full.txt
- Human HTML surface: /pixi-wiki/

## Scope

Covers: Pixiedust agent knowledge routing, Knowledge concepts, project entrypoints, MOCs, and KPR operating boundaries.

Not covered: private vault content outside the generated public surface, secrets, raw memory/Honcho data, runtime automation internals, MCP/search/RAG/confidence calibration, or facts newer than source dates.

## Domains

### Knowledge

Entrypoints:
- [Knowledge Domain Pack](/pixi-wiki/knowledge.html) — role: `domain-entrypoint` — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/llms.txt` — current: 2026-06-15

Concepts:
- [AI-Native Problem Framing Framework](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-ai-native-problem-framing-framework.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/ai-native-problem-framing-framework.md` — updated: 2026-06-11
- [Agent Capability Route Pattern](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-agent-capability-route-pattern.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/agent-capability-route-pattern.md` — updated: 2026-06-13
- [Agent Wikis](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-agent-wikis.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/agent-wikis.md` — updated: 2026-06-15 — Agent-native knowledge surfaces that give agents maintained, scoped, source-backed maps before they act.
- [Bounded Context Tree Pattern](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-bounded-context-tree-pattern.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/bounded-context-tree-pattern.md` — updated: 2026-06-07
- [Building Software Is Learning](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-building-software-is-learning.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/building-software-is-learning.md` — updated: 2026-06-11
- [Find the Lock: Problem-First Approach](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-find-the-lock-problem-first.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/find-the-lock-problem-first.md` — updated: 2026-06-11
- [Hermes SOUL.md Wiring](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-hermes-soul-md-wiring.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/hermes-soul-md-wiring.md` — updated: 2026-06-12
- [Local Retrieval-Augmented Agent Infrastructure](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-local-retrieval-agent-infrastructure.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/local-retrieval-agent-infrastructure.md` — updated: 2026-06-15 — Applied architecture lessons from Krill's dual-RTX 5090 local agent stack — hardware setup, retrieval pipeline (Qdrant + Ollama + MCP), agent workflow governance, and relevance to Jamie's PC build decisions.
- [MOC Knowledge Cortex](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-moc-knowledge-cortex.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/moc-knowledge-cortex.md` — updated: 2026-06-13 — Model of the MOC layer as the routing brain of the vault, keeping durable notes reachable through clear domain branches.
- [Matt Pocock SDLC Rhythm](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-matt-pocock-sdlc-rhythm.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/matt-pocock-sdlc-rhythm.md` — updated: 2026-06-07
- [Peer Profiles vs Child Processes](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-peer-profiles-vs-child-processes.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/peer-profiles-vs-child-processes.md` — updated: 2026-06-13 — Architecture decision for when Jamie's crew agents run as peer Hermes profiles versus child/subagent processes.
- [Profile Memory Boundaries](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-profile-memory-boundaries.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/profile-memory-boundaries.md` — updated: 2026-06-13 — Boundary model for routing durable knowledge between USER.md, Hermes memory, local knowledge, Obsidian/GitHub project truth, and skills.
- [Runtime Memory Knowledge Routing](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-runtime-memory-knowledge-routing.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/runtime-memory-knowledge-routing.md` — updated: 2026-06-15 — Runtime rule for combining injected memory, Honcho, local Hermes knowledge, Obsidian Knowledge, skills, GitHub/project truth, and session search without turning memory into a wiki dump.
- [Self-Improving Agent Systems](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-self-improving-agent-systems.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/self-improving-agent-systems.md` — updated: 2026-06-13 — Model for agent systems that improve through verified durable state, evidence grades, promotion ladders, and future-run retrieval rather than weight updates.
- [Verb-First Product Positioning](/pixi-wiki/concept-knowledge-concepts-verb-first-product-positioning.html) — raw: `/pixi-wiki/raw/Knowledge/concepts/verb-first-product-positioning.md` — updated: 2026-06-11
